project_area: Tax relief and rebates for eligible Pennsylvanians
demographic_requirements: Older Pennsylvanians, people with disabilities, and working Pennsylvanians meeting income eligibility criteria
eligibility_summary: Eligibility varies by program but generally includes Pennsylvania residents who are older adults, individuals with disabilities, or working individuals meeting specific income thresholds. Programs include the Property Tax/Rent Rebate Program and the Working Pennsylvanians Tax Credit.
